goal: 实现 dev-loop Phase 2: AgentRuntime + Task + TaskContext + GuardrailChain + 5 个内置 Guardrail；重写 gates/base.py + gates/gates.py 从 Gate 二态升级为 Guardrail 四态（pass/block/drop/retry）。

phases.name: D1.01: Task + TaskContext + AgentRuntime 实现 + 长度校验
phases.goal: 实现 runtime/task.py (Task + TaskResult) + runtime/context.py (TaskContext) + 重写 runtime/runtime.py (AgentRuntime)，补 v3.0 §5.6 长度校验。
tasks: 建 runtime/task.py：Task dataclass (description/expected_output/context/tools/output_schema) + TaskResult dataclass (agent_type/values/raw_response/parsed_json/tool_calls)
建 runtime/context.py：TaskContext dataclass (stage/state/result)，参考 AutoGen MessageContext
重写 runtime/runtime.py AgentRuntime — 参考 v3.0 §四 4.1 + AutoGen _single_threaded_agent_runtime.py:249-270
register(agent_type, factory, expected_class) — AutoGen 类型检查模式
_get_or_create_agent 懒实例化 — AutoGen _get_agent 借鉴
execute() 包含：guardrail_chain.on_execute_start → agent.execute → guardrail_chain.on_execute_end → 长度校验 → writes 映射
长度校验：len(result.values()) != len(stage.output_channels) 抛 AEError(INVALID_AGENT_OUTPUT)
更新 runtime/__init__.py 暴露 AgentRuntime/Task/TaskResult/TaskContext
加 8 测试：Task 创建/TaskResult 字段/AgentRuntime register 类型检查/length mismatch 抛错
跑 42+ 测试全绿 (含 C.02 完成态)
git commit feat(runtime): Task+TaskContext+AgentRuntime 含长度校验 (Plan D1)

phases.name: D1.02: 5 个内置 Guardrail + gates/ 重写 + Gate 验证 (block/drop/retry 三态)
phases.goal: 重写 gates/base.py (GuardrailResult + GuardrailHandler Protocol + GuardrailChain) + gates/builtin.py (5 个内置 Guardrail)；Gate 验证三态正确。
tasks: 重写 gates/base.py: GuardrailResult (success, result, error, action) 四态 + DropOutput sentinel + GuardrailHandler Protocol + GuardrailChain
DefaultGuardrailHandler 透传 — CrewAI 借鉴
重写 gates/builtin.py 实现 5 Guardrail: RequirementGuardrail/PlanExistsGuardrail/GitCleanGuardrail/TestsPassGuardrail/GitDiffExistsGuardrail
PlanExistsGuardrail 适配 v3.0 §3.3 design/dev-loop-plan.md 路径
GitDiffExistsGuardrail 改用 ctx.state.commit_hash (v3.0 §2.2) 而非旧 ctx.git_commits
build_guardrail_chain() 工厂函数按 v3.0 §5.5 顺序组装
更新 gates/__init__.py 暴露 GuardrailResult/DropOutput/GuardrailChain/5 Guardrail
加 15 测试：GuardrailResult 字段/Chain 短路/DropOutput sentinel/5 Guardrail 各 2 测试 (pass+block/drop/retry)
Gate 验证：Mock Agent + 真实 GuardrailChain — pre-block 抛 GuardrailBlockedError / post-retry 抛 GuardrailRetrySignal / post-drop 抛 OutputDropped
Gate 验证：真实 LoopEngine.run() + 真实 AgentRuntime + Mock Agent 跑通 3 Stage 全流程
git commit feat(gates): GuardrailChain + 5 Guardrail 重写 (Plan D1)
